title: Health Status Indicator
description: A simple Minecraft HUD addon showing classic-style health, and status effects with a clean and optimized design. Lightweight, responsive, and perfect for survival, PvP, and modded gameplay.
body:
Health & Status Indicator

Enhance your Minecraft experience with a clean and responsive HUD indicator. This addon displays hearts, armor, hunger, saturation, and status effects in a classic Minecraft style. Perfect for PvP, survival, modded adventures, and optimized for minimal performance impact.
